rulings.Calendar Matter: Special Administrator'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Response At Oral Depositions
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel responses at depositions is DENIED without prejudice. Counsel for Darrell Simmons shall meet and confer (by phone or in person) with new counsel for Darnis Ann Banks no later than 2/28/2014 to resolve any and all issues raised in the previously filed motion. An exchange of e-mails or correspondence will not constitute a good faith meet and confer and may be a basis for further denial of any future motion. Should these discussions not resolve the underyling issues, counsel for Darrell Simmons may file a renewed motion to compel responses with separate statement as part of his moving papers. The separate statement shall comply with CRC 3.1345(c). While the Court will not rule on the substantive issues at the hearing on February 20, 2014, the Court is willing to hear brief argument to clarify the scope of what is disputed.
